title: Old wind burst
description: the wind burst enchantment can now be ativated without a smash attack
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1af71189dede4258766a75b4957acefce1910966.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1406)

Changes wind burst to it's original state

with means that it can be activated without a smash attack and the strenth of the explosion is reduced
